name: Remote Game Server Scanner
notes: Reports a remote host attempting reconnaissance or suspicious connections on common game server ports to more than 30 hosts in 10 minutes.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times
conditions_text: when the event context is Remote to Local, Remote to Remote
when an event matches any of the following BB:PortDefinition: Game Server Ports
when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 29 destination IP within 10 minutes
thresholds: when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 29 destination IP within 10 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Remote Game Server Scanner on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event context is Remote to Local, Remote to Remote
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:PortDefinition: Game Server Ports
AND when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 29 destination IP within 10 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Remote Game Server Scanner Detected
Event description: Detected  a remote host attempting reconnaissance or suspicious connections on common game server ports to more than 30 hosts in 10 minutes.
